title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 388.615 - Identification filed with director of department of public safety
text:
388.615.  Identification filed with director of department of public safety. — Each railroad policeman shall file with the director of the department of public safety his photograph, fingerprints and signature.
(L. 1971 H.B. 232 § 4, A.L. 2006 S.B. 933)
